steps.title: Find the roots
steps.content:
The factored form shows the roots directly.
$$x-10=0\quad\text{or}\quad x+13=0$$
So the roots are $10$ and $-13$.

steps.title: Use the midpoint
steps.content: The parabola opens upward, so its minimum occurs at the vertex. The vertex x-coordinate is halfway between the roots.

steps.title: Find the vertex
steps.content:
Average the two root values.
$$x=\frac{10+(-13)}{2}=-\frac{3}{2}$$
The answer is D.
